heroInsight: Carousels are rivaling Reels with massive save rates right now — creators should leverage this by focusing on swipe-through transformation stories.

formatPerformance.summary: Carousels are seeing a resurgence with impressive save rates, while Reels maintain strong reach if the first 3 seconds are captivating.

data.name: Reel
data.note: Reels need strong hooks to capture viewers instantly.

data.name: Carousel
data.note: Carousels are getting increased saves, suggesting deep engagement.

data.name: Story
data.note: Stories remain consistent but less impactful than carousels or reels.

data.name: Static
data.note: Static posts are less engaging without dynamic storytelling.

hotTopics.detail: The Ozempic debate is raging — creators should weigh in with their personal takes or client stories.
As the New Year resolution wave fades, people gear up for spring cuts — capitalize with diet and workout tips.
Highlight how fitness isn’t just about aesthetics but also about feeling good.
With the rise of eco-consciousness, discuss sustainable workout gear and practices.
Explore the intersection of AI and fitness — from personalized plans to virtual coaches.

hashtagIntel.recommendation: Use on Tuesdays for transformation posts.

critical: DM shares are now the #1 engagement signal, prioritize content that encourages sharing.
proTips: Use carousels to increase save rates, which make up 25% of ranking power.

tiktokCrossover.summary: Fitness trends on TikTok are starting to influence IG — keep an eye out for emerging audio and format crossovers.
